expositionText: Something has been raiding our stores at night. I found tracks leading {location_hint}, toward the caves.
acceptText: I need someone to deal with this. Head out there and kill {gather_count} {enemy_type_plural}. That should put an end to it.
declineText: Fine. I'll board up the storehouse and hope for the best.
skillcheckPassText: You've got the look of someone who's handled worse. Good.
skillcheckFailText: You seem unsure, but I'm out of options.
expositionTurnInText: You dealt with them? The storehouse is safe, then.
conflict1Text: Wait. One of them dropped something. I need you to collect {gather_count} {quest_item} from the area. There may be more of them nesting nearby.
conflict1TurnInText: Just as I feared. There's a whole group of them.
conflict2Text: Go speak with {target_npc}. They patrol that area and might know where the nest is.
conflict2TurnInText: So that's where they've been hiding. Good to know.
resolutionText: The raids have stopped completely. I owe you a great deal. Thank you.
